untranslatable_reason: Triple Top pattern requires multi-bar historical pattern recognition (price testing same resistance level exactly 3 times) and Advance Block candlestick formation detection. These are multi-candle structural patterns not expressible as single-bar indicator comparisons. The signal requires: (1) detection of 3 prior swing highs at identical or near-identical price levels, (2) identification of Advance Block pattern (3 consecutive white candles with decreasing body sizes and upper wicks). Standard allowed indicators cannot encode these specific multi-bar pattern requirements.
translation_notes: The core entry logic (triple tops + Advance Block) cannot be translated to allowed indicators without pattern recognition libraries. Exit condition interpreted as gap-down open following pattern formation, but full pattern detection is beyond scope of single-bar indicator rules.
